props.text: Our people make the work feel effortless.
Design, engineering, and customer success share one roadmap—fewer handoffs, clearer tradeoffs, and a group that shows up when something urgent lands on your calendar.
Keeps releases predictable without slowing discovery—she turns customer tension into a roadmap teams actually ship.
Owns the glue between services and the guardrails that keep deploys boring in the best way.
Turns fuzzy direction into durable systems—type, color, and layout that stay coherent as pages multiply.
Runs the conversations after launch—training, rollout, and follow-ups that turn pilots into steady relationships.
Careful with accessibility and performance budgets so interfaces feel fast on real devices, not just polished demos.
